SEPARATE STATEMENT IN SUPPORT OF MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION; SET NO. ONE, AGAINST DARRELL REED; REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS (TRANSACTION ID # 100069835) FILED BY DEFENDANT NOR-CAL SCAFFOLDING, INC. LUXFORD, FRED
COURT REPORTING SERVICES LESS THAN 1 HOUR (TRANSACTION ID # 100072472) FILED BY DEFENDANT NOR-CAL SCAFFOLDING, INC. LUXFORD, FRED

DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANTS NOR-CAL SCAFFOLDING, INC., AND FRED LUXFORD'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO REQUEST FOR ADMISSIONS: DEFENDANTS NOR-CAL SCAFFOLDING, INC. AND FRED LUXFORD'S UNOPPOSED MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO RFAS AND TO COMPEL DEPOSITION WITH PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO PROVIDE VERIFIED, CODE-COMPLIANT AMENDED RESPONSES TO ALL RFAS WITHIN TEN DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. PLAINTIFF SHALL MAKE HIMSELF AVAILABLE FOR DEPOSITION AND PROVIDE RESPONSIVE DOCUMENTS WITHIN TWO WEEKS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. IF PLAINTIFF FAILS TO TIMELY PROVIDE THE AMENDED RESPONSES OR FAILS TO MAKE HIMSELF AVAILABLE FOR DEPOSITION, SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $2,000 SHALL BE DUE AND PAYABLE AGAINST PLAINTIFF IN FAVOR OF DEFENDANTS WITHIN THREE WEEKS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. NOTICE OF THIS ORDER SHALL BE PROVIDED BY OVERNIGHT MAIL. ORDER IS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE PRO TEM: PETER CATALANOTTI, CLERK: S. LE, NOT REPORTED. =(302/JPT)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-06-2019 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enforce Order For Monetary Sanctions And For Entry Of Judgment Against Plaintiff Darrell Reed
Off Calendar Aug-20-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

RULING: There being no appearance, the tentative ruling is adopted as follows:

DEFENDANTS NOR-CAL SCAFFOLDING, INC. AND FRED LUXFORD'S Motion To Enforce Order For Monetary Sanctions And For Entry Of Judgment Against Plaintiff Darrell Reed is GRANTED. No opposition filed.

The Court signed the proposed order and proposed judgment submitted by email.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Jun-19-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
A. Robert Rosin, esq. (650-691-2888) of Leonidou & Rosin for Defendant.
No other appearances.

Not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTs NOR-CAL SCAFFOLDING, INC. and FRED LUXFORD's Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is granted. No opposition filed.

Order is signed in open court.

MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO REQUEST FOR ADMISSIONS
Off Calendar May-22-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
A. Robert Rosin, esq. (650-691-2888) of Leonidou & Rosin for Defendants.
No other appearances.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTs NOR-CAL SCAFFOLDING, INC., and FRED LUXFORD's MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO REQUEST FOR ADMISSIONS

Defendants Nor-Cal Scaffolding, Inc. and Fred Luxford's unopposed Motion to Compel Further Responses to RFAs and to Compel Deposition with Production of Documents is GRANTED. Plaintiff is ordered to provide verified, code-compliant amended responses to all RFAs within ten days of Notice of this Order. Plaintiff shall make himself available for deposition and provide responsive documents within two weeks of Notice of this Order. If plaintiff fails to timely provide the amended responses or fails to make himself available for deposition, sanctions in the amount of $2,000 shall be due and payable against plaintiff in favor of defendants within three weeks of Notice of this Order. Notice of this Order shall be provided by overnight mail.

Order is signed in open court.

Judge Pro Tem: Peter Catalanotti, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
